titlestmt.titleproper: First Presbyterian Church of Galen records6019
titlestmt.author: Compiled by S.L.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-12-31 18:22:00 -0500.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Presbyterian Church of Galen records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Presbyterian Church of Galen (Galen, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Records consist of two volumes of church records (1840-1896, 1838-1875) containing annual meeting minutes, minutes of special and session meetings, the Church Covenant and Confession of Faith. A third volume (1875-1895) is a register with lists of elders, deacons, pastors, communicants, baptisms, marriages and deaths.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: This church was organized on July 8, 1814 by the Rev. Frances Pomeroy of Lyons and Rev. Hypociates Roc of Palmyra.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Early records of the church and files of correspondence are missing. Item 1, a record book, contains minutes of annual meetings of the church, 1840-96. Item 2, Volume II of records, contains both rosters and minutes of session and special church meetings, with a copy of the Confession of Faith and Church Covenant. Item 3 is a register containing information on elders, deacons, pastors, communicants, baptisms, marriages and deaths.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Presbyterian Church of Galen records, #6019. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Wayne County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Presbyterian Church -- Membership.
Presbyterian Church -- New York (State) -- Galen.

did.unittitle: Records of the 1st Pres. Society, (1840-96) , no pagination

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual meeting minutes at which the renewal of the pastor's contract, the election of trustees, the election of officers of the meetings, and the financial condition of the church are discussed. In 1842 the church asked the Home Missionary Society for support. A seat rental floor for 1871 and miscellaneous notes follow the minutes.

did.unittitle: Records of the First Presbyterian Church Galen Vol. II, Kept (1838-75), information from

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pastors of the church 1820-1873 with name, date of installation, and other notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ruling elders of the church, l8l4-43 with name and date of ordination.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Deacons of the church, 1814-43 with name and date of ordination. 3-9 Members, 1814-1831, name, date of admission, manner of admission and other notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Explanation of the membership list. 11-21 Minutes of session and special meetings commencing on March 30, 1838, deal with membership, election of deacons and elders, church discipline and occasionally with other matters. Specifics follow.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Confession of Faith adopted January 23, l84l.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church Covenant adopted January 23, l84l.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: December 21, 1842 - a trial for heresy in doctrine and violation of the covenant.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: September 19, 1843 - woman's trial for violation of the covenant (joining Campbellites).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Trial of husband of above.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 14, 1845 - trial for unchristian-like conduct and intemperance.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: October 1, 1843 - trial for violation of the 7th Commandment.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: January 5, 1846 - trial for intoxication.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: February 5, 1846 - Report to the Presbytery containing statistics, a statement on the state of religion, and reports of renewed in-terest in temperance and lisence law and a joint effort with other denominations to distribute tracts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: February 1, 1847 - Report of the Presbytery.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 1848 - Report to the Presbytery.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A long list of changes is made by a church member and responded to by the church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 21, 1866 - a statement on dancing.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Membership statistics.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Membership and contribution statistics.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 2, 1871 - 72 new members; Nov. 4, 1873 - "a scheme for the Benevolence of the Church" is presented; Nov. 18, 1874 - A resolution to the youth in the church is presented; Dec. 20, 1874 15 baptized.

did.unittitle: 21 pp. at end of the Vol.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Restorations, 3 p.; "Baptisms of Adults", 1864-1874, 2 p.; "Infants Baptized", 1864-1874, 9 p.; "Baptism of Children", 18l4-l857

did.unittitle: The Church Register of the Galen Presbyterian Church at Clyde, Wayne Co., N.Y.,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Register of Elders, 1814-95. Contains name, when ordained, dismissed, ceased to act, or died.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Register of Deacons, l8l4-8l. Information as above.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Register of Pastors, 1820-30. Information as above.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Register of Communicants, 1821-95. Contains name, date of admission, how received, dismissed, when and whether, death date, and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Register of Baptisms, 1875-91. Contains name, whether adult, parent's names, when born and when baptised.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Register of Marriages, 1875-96. Contains the name, residence, and age of the couple, the date of marriage and names of the witnesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Register of Deaths, 1875-77. Contains the name, date of death, age and remarks.
